Static Evolution is an independent home for practical writing, tools, and consulting about building durable software.

## What you will find here

- Notes on software, systems, and the craft of making useful things.
- Small products and experiments that put those ideas to work.
- Occasional consulting focused on thoughtful, maintainable technology.

## This site

Static Evolution is a custom Django application hosted on Railway. Posts are written in Markdown and published through its own admin interface. The site is deliberately small, fast, and readable.

## Transparency

The structure and visual direction of this site are inspired in part by Simon Willison’s site: https://simonwillison.net/. Read the full disclosures at /disclosures/ for attribution and implementation details.
About Static Evolution: practical writing, tools, and consulting for durable software.
